decision: Compare navbar menu to mind map graph — make navigation trees consistent

steps.action: Compare navbar menu to mind map graph — make navigation trees consistent
steps.notes: Full comparison complete. 5 inconsistencies found: (1) Chorus missing from mind map Cultivating branch, (2) Images in navbar but not mind map, (3) Movies in mind map but not navbar, (4) Watchlist duplicated in navbar (Harvesting+Reflecting) but only in Reflecting on mind map, (5) disabled placeholder mismatch (Images vs Movies). All are product/taxonomy decisions, not code bugs. Admin section correctly omitted from mind map. Self center node correctly absent from navbar.

Reviewed. 5 inconsistencies are product decisions: (1) Add Chorus to mind map Cultivating branch — it belongs there. (2) Rename Images→Movies in navbar to match mind map. (3) Watchlist: keep in Reflecting only on both — remove navbar duplicate from Harvesting. (4) Disabled placeholders: align on Movies (not Images) as the placeholder name. Will card the fixes separately.
